creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
travelling to Türkiye & flying @turkishairlines ✨🇹🇷✈️🌎👩‍🍳✨ is always full of amazing experiences 

my recent trip to @goturkiye has been enchanting & enriching & ending the trip from Istanbul to Singapore couldn’t be better by enjoying the stylish #TurkishAirlines business lounge before my flight 

the lounge features spacious seating arrangements, including comfortable armchairs, sofas, and quiet areas for those looking to relax or work, private workstations equipped with charging ports and high-speed Wi-Fi, ensuring that business travelers can stay productive

flying business class makes my 11 hour flight a truly enjoyable & comfortable journey 

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#gotürkiye 
#turkishairlinesbusinessclass #turkishairlineslounge #dotzsoh

transcription.text: Turkish Airlines Lounge in Istanbul is a true oasis for travelers. Embodying the warm hospitality and rich culture of Turkey, travelers can enjoy a wide variety of delicious options. Explore media zones, golf simulation and massage services. Next, I am flying from Istanbul to Singapore on an 11-hour flight. Passengers enjoy priority boarding. Each seat is equipped with personal entertainment systems. The lay-flat seats in Business Class are designed for maximum comfort. Headphones, Laven amenities pouch, blanket and slippers, trying the oldest bread baked freshly and choosing gourmet starters from Flying Chef add a unique touch to the dining experience. A perfect blend of comfort, culture and culinary delight. Next stop is my favorite selection of desserts and sweet treats. And finally a restful sleep during long-haul flights. Making the journey seamless from start to finish.
